subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65be673603203ee98ff18593c943abb4556153a0a72a448c405ae5fddf18778f4b34ab0f0cfa4aa1bb94d5014c548797189
Trump Says Tax Cuts Allow Workers to Pocket More

- Fox Business

On Thursday, President Donald J. Trump announced new survey results showing that optimism among U.S. manufacturers has reached unprecedented levels. “Optimism among small manufacturers was at its highest level ever recorded throughout the survey’s 20 year history,” Brittany De Lea reports.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65b902d031391111ecaa7b67cd77c41fc2c0a5ce1ac1f45223cb0d450ff6dfe32589ba8b1bd813f9a21a662d0538cf76fd8

Number of People Receiving Unemployment Benefits Running at 44-Year Lows

- Washington Examiner

According to the latest numbers from the U.S. Department of Labor, the number of individuals on unemployment benefits is at its lowest level in more than four decades. “Low jobless claims are a good sign for the economy. They suggest that layoffs are rare,” Joseph Lawler writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65bf8e038fa816cd9bf4f70bee555bce55caaf7c3451b62bc6c81bd8f1268a72267b79bd0dddb6438523030f1c9fbc69b1e

President Donald Trump Signs Bill to Fight Online Sex Trafficking

-The Cleveland Plain Dealer

On Wednesday, President Trump signed a bill that “establishes fines and prison terms for operators of websites that engage in online sex trafficking,” Sabrina Eaton reports. The bipartisan bill was championed by Ivanka Trump, who held a roundtable on trafficking at the White House last month.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65bc73c89a1acf099ef9204221020dac4bebff84f16911f6d7a5d509af24eee6804ccec932616c5a3a509a117cafcb6b425

Sen. Corker Says He Will 'Avidly Support' Pompeo Nomination for Secretary of State

- Times Free Press

Senate Foreign Relations Committee Chairman Bob Corker (R-TN) said he will “avidly support” President Trump’s nomination of CIA Director Mike Pompeo for Secretary of State. “I think your background could not be better to serve in this capacity,” Sen. Corker told Pompeo this week.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65bb1f9ab3c7181636112a302fe406716bbcdfbd84528b095ee096cac7c25d776cfc4bb187617062c3c4cd94717ce6b51de

U.S. to Export Pork to Argentina Under New Rules After 26 years

- Reuters

"U.S. pork will be imported into Argentina for the first time since 1992 under newly finalized technical and safety rules,” Reuters reports. “The technical requirements implement a deal announced last August following a meeting between Argentine President Mauricio Macri and U.S. Vice-President Mike Pence."

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65ba2f465f2bad099fe48c0a4541f20bdf38a6e89ad016e9d7a7742d8d516b88f3c77e73391ccfd78e726129ee079fed47c

Attorney General Jeff Sessions Promises “New Sheriff in Town” on Trip to Mexico Border

- CBS News

This week, Attorney General Jeff Sessions visited America’s southern border, delivering a message of support for law enforcement officials. The Attorney General also reiterated the President’s calls for stronger border security. “The lack of a wall on the Southern border is an open invitation to illegal border crossings," he said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65b8902e5c8fe46495feadcf23c6e22082406229b881866d4fd8de39ecd3ef9e6c7727fbae7d11484662aa88b696c5b6055

MS-13 Member Posing As Unaccompanied Minor Was Linked to the ‘Migrant Caravan,’ Says Border Patrol

- Breitbart

In southern Arizona, U.S. Border Patrol agents came upon a large group of 61 illegal immigrants—one of whom was a member of MS-13 posing as an unaccompanied minor. “We questioned the members of the group and confirmed they are part of the caravan of Central Americans who are reported to be traveling to the U.S.,” Border Patrol spokesman Justin Kallinger said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65b8c229c2c568dfb412cec8278fa034b2d91bed177b65f7b3992fce7c6b673579791f5643f45865fbcb5edf62426b49b96

California Gov. Jerry Brown Agrees to Send National Guard Troops to the Border

- Washington Examiner

This week, California Gov. Jerry Brown announced that his state will join Texas, Arizona, and New Mexico in “sending National Guard troops to help secure the U.S.-Mexico border,” Anna Giaritelli reports. The California Governor “had been the only border-state governor not to support the operation despite talks with DHS and DOD, until now,” she notes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65b4c3d2f1c7ed240cb340207ec2997197973f8506013a218aa6b3eb241a4087610d896a49075b2310aff7c6e6d0e1c9fca

British Banks Will Have to Cut Ties to Sanctioned Oligarchs, U.S. Says

- The New York Times

The United States has “ratcheted up its efforts to block Kremlin-linked industrialists from doing business in the West, warning that British banks will have to sever their relationships with the tycoons if they want continued access to American financial institutions,” The New York Times reports.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d17ae5500a53b65b9469f504793563a5131468bbee4227c1d53fb8e580e7047f405afa844c23c6995f3a982edb785011c0cf2abe349d042b

Sign up today to join our amazing team of volunteers -- we need you! | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc485e8/c1f7015/697c9849/11430567/2571719462/VEsH/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/volunteer?utm_source=ema_2018-04-13_volunteer&source=ema_2018-04-13_volunteer&utm_campaign=volunteer&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, Tina got her start in local politics as a volunteer, knocking doors in apartment complexes in her neighborhood. Campaigns had written those folks off because many of them were young renters and people thought they weren't invested in their community. Tina didn't buy it. She thought they deserved a voice just as much as anyone else. So, she went up and down the hallways talking to voters, finding supporters in surprising places, and talking to people about what was happening in their lives. In the end, her candidate won that race by just half a point. As Minnesotans, we have a long tradition of grassroots organizing. So, we've all seen that meaningful one-on-one conversations with voters can make all the difference. In tight races, elections are won or lost in the field. Starting those in-person conversations as early as possible is key to building networks of support across our state. And we can't do it without you. [**This year's Senate special election in Minnesota is bound to be close. Join our team of volunteers to make sure we don't leave any votes on the field!**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc485e8/c1f7015/697c9849/11430567/2571719462/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/volunteer?utm_source=ema_2018-04-13_volunteer&source=ema_2018-04-13_volunteer&utm_campaign=volunteer&utm_medium=ema") Whether you've been pounding the sidewalks in your neighborhood since you were a kid, or whether this is your first time taking action on a political campaign, it's never too late to start. We'll make sure you have all the training you need to have meaningful conversations with your neighbors. If knocking doors isn't your cup of tea, there are plenty of other ways to be involved -- from phone banking, to writing letters, to entering data, to helping at our field offices. We're also looking for volunteers to help out at community events by talking about Tina with their neighbors. Sign up now, and we'll be in touch to get you set up with the perfect volunteer opportunity. | [VOLUNTEER WITH TINA »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc485e8/c1f7015/697c9849/11430567/2571719462/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/volunteer?utm_source=ema_2018-04-13_volunteer&source=ema_2018-04-13_volunteer&utm_campaign=volunteer&utm_medium=ema")

Thanks for everything you do for our campaign -- we couldn't do it without your help!
Sincerely,
Sally Miller
Deputy Campaign Manager for Organizing, Tina for Minnesota

| | **Joe just had his _best fundraising quarter EVER!_** This is outstanding, Peter -- last quarter's fundraising success will go a long way toward helping us keep pace in _one of the most high-profile races in the nation!_ **But it 's not all good news...** **In less than two weeks, the Koch brothers spent as much on ads to defeat Joe as we raised during _all of last quarter._** Look, we know we can't compete with them dollar for dollar. **The only way we can win this race is with _people power_ \-- and we need you on board, Peter. Can you donate now to help us send Joe back to the Senate? >>** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Kochs' big spend is just the beginning. The _Indy Star_ is already reporting that "super PACs are expected to bombard Indiana with advertising." Meanwhile, **Nate Silver is calling this race a "toss-up" and _Politico_ even thinks Joe is "the nation's most vulnerable Democratic senator."**

So if we want to pull out a win, we have to keep up the record pace we set last quarter, plain and simple. And that's where you come in. **[Can you chip in $5 to help Joe fight back against the Koch-funded attacks?>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2037/7377f838/3e2cc471/51fab96d/2930671782/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-helpjoe?refcode=20180414nd&amount=10")**

Thanks, Peter. This thing is going to be a marathon, but we can win it with your help.

\-- Team Donnelly

name: Team Inslee
subject: Republicans gone wild
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Here's why Donald Trump and Republicans are furious. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd798c6/2f5ea88d/727d2496/2cbcb12a/711507256/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonth-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Under Jay's leadership, Washington is setting the bar for putting our progressive values into action. The 2018 legislative session racked up achievement after achievement. It was one of the most productive in recent memory. And that's making Donald Trump and Republicans furious. You see, as they implement their extreme policies to halt our progress, dragging America back into the dark ages, Trump and his allies don't want our states -- or governors like Jay -- showing what can be accomplished when government works for people instead of special interests. That's why Jay needs your help today. It's the only way to stop Donald Trump's harsh agenda in its tracks. [**As we head into the 2018 elections, we're looking for 1,000 supporters to step up by midnight Sunday and show Jay they're standing with him as he fights the Trump agenda. Will you donate $5 to help?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd798c6/2f5ea88d/727d2496/2cbcb12a/711507256/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonth-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") With 24 state Senate seats and all 98 House seats on the ballot in Washington state this November, we can't give Republicans any advantage. With narrow Democratic majorities in both chambers, the GOP would like nothing better than taking back the Senate and the House -- and putting an end to the progress we're making. Jay's fighting to make sure it doesn't happen. He knows the enormous damage that would happen to our state if Republicans control the state legislature, Congress, and the White House. [**With so much at stake, will you contribute immediately so Jay can help Democrats up and down the ballot win in November?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd798c6/2f5ea88d/727d2496/2cbcb12a/711507256/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonth-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Team Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd798c6/2f5ea88d/727d2496/2cbcb12a/711507256/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonth-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-04-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")

clean_body: Here's why Donald Trump and Republicans are furious. | "" Friend, Under Jay's leadership, Washington is setting the bar for putting our progressive values into action. The 2018 legislative session racked up achievement after achievement. It was one of the most productive in recent memory. And that's making Donald Trump and Republicans furious. You see, as they implement their extreme policies to halt our progress, dragging America back into the dark ages, Trump and his allies don't want our states -- or governors like Jay -- showing what can be accomplished when government works for people instead of special interests. That's why Jay needs your help today. It's the only way to stop Donald Trump's harsh agenda in its tracks. "" With 24 state Senate seats and all 98 House seats on the ballot in Washington state this November, we can't give Republicans any advantage. With narrow Democratic majorities in both chambers, the GOP would like nothing better than taking back the Senate and the House -- and putting an end to the progress we're making. Jay's fighting to make sure it doesn't happen. He knows the enormous damage that would happen to our state if Republicans control the state legislature, Congress, and the White House. "" Team Inslee | ""

This has been a huge week for our campaign! Here's what's been happening on the ground:

We launched our first TV ad! With this ad we have been able to spread Kyrsten's message to more Arizonans than ever before. Reaching voters across the state is critical to winning in November, which is why we're starting ads early and running them often.
